codeReview.summary: The feature adds the achievement panel UI, unlock toast, V-key toggle, and getBonuses() stat merge, but it misses a blocking runtime requirement: level achievements only update after monster kills, so reaching a level threshold through any non-kill XP source leaves the panel and rewards stale until another kill happens.

issues.description: Level achievements are checked only in the monster-death flow via `this.achievementSystem.checkLevel(this.player.level)`. The feature spec requires real-time progress tracking from all sources, but level-based achievements will not unlock when the player levels from quest turn-ins or other non-kill XP sources until a later kill occurs.

`toggleAchievement()` registers a new global `this.input.on('wheel', ...)` handler every time the panel opens, but never removes it when the panel closes or the scene shuts down. Reopening the panel stacks duplicate wheel listeners, causing repeated scroll steps and avoidable input-handler leaks.

`update()` increments shared progress once per matching achievement, so generic kill progress is advanced multiple times per call when several generic kill achievements are still locked. This makes progress values and UI bars drift from actual player actions (for example one kill can add multiple points toward `kill` progress), even though thresholds are eventually reached.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `ui-worker` skill requires visual verification in browser for UI work, but this worker transcript only shows file edits plus build/typecheck/tests and no browser/manual verification evidence for the new achievement panel or toast behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill: /Users/feuvan/src/abyssfire/.factory/skills/ui-worker/SKILL.md says 'Visual verification in browser. This is critical for UI work'. Transcript skeleton and handoff for worker session 32c756c0-f2b1-4264-a185-f50be0a51fac list only `npx vitest run`, `npm run build`, and `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Achievement-specific runtime patterns are not documented in shared library/architecture notes even though this feature establishes them: V-key panel toggle via `UI_TOGGLE_PANEL`, unlock toast through `ACHIEVEMENT_UNLOCKED`, and stat reward merge through `ZoneScene.getEquipStats()` calling `achievementSystem.getBonuses()`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Implementation references: `src/scenes/ZoneScene.ts:1262`, `src/scenes/UIScene.ts:3216`, `src/scenes/ZoneScene.ts:1791`. No achievement-related notes exist in `.factory/library/architecture.md` or `.factory/library/environment.md`.

summary: Reviewed commit 7373165, the handoff, transcript skeleton, and relevant UI/system code for achievement-panel. The panel UI and tests are substantial, but the feature does not fully meet the runtime requirement for real-time level achievement tracking from all progression sources, so the review fails.
